data.title: Add commit workflow average duration metric to review-stats.py
data.description:
## Description

review-stats.py compute_metrics() includes commit failure rate but NOT average duration. Fix: extract duration_ms from commit_workflow end events, compute mean, add to commit_stats dict and format_table output.

## TDD Requirement
RED: Add test_commit_avg_duration pytest test. GREEN: Implement the metric.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass. Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_review_stats.py -q
